message:
feat(server): ambient effects, reservation create modal, quick-reply, and TUI hardening

Major TUI feature additions and robustness improvements:

Ambient effect renderer:
- Integrate AmbientEffectRenderer into MailAppModel view() pipeline,
  rendering health-aware ambient visual effects behind all content.
- Add AmbientMode config parsing from tui_ambient setting (off/subtle).
- Derive AmbientHealthInput from event ring stats, severity scanning,
  and last-event staleness to drive idle/warning/critical states.
- New tests: ambient_mode_off_disables_renderer, health_input_flags_*,
  ring_utilization_warning_threshold.

Reservation create modal (reservations screen):
- Full modal form with Paths (TextArea), Exclusive toggle, TTL presets
  (1h/4h/12h/24h/Custom), custom TTL input (Nm/Nh), optional Reason.
- Tab/Shift+Tab field cycling with focus-dependent custom TTL visibility.
- Validation: path/TTL/context errors displayed inline.
- Submit via F5/Ctrl+Enter calls file_reservation_paths tool, parses
  granted/conflicts, and emits reservation_create_result toast.
- Keybinding 'n' opens form; Escape cancels. consumes_text_input()
  prevents key passthrough while modal is active.

Quick-reply support:
- Messages screen: 'r' key opens QuickReplyFormState modal for selected
  message with pre-filled thread/subject/recipient context.
- Thread explorer: 'r' key emits DeepLinkTarget::ReplyToMessage from
  both detail_tree_focus and preview_focus states.
- Tests for quick-reply modal lifecycle, tab cycling, ack toggle,
  validation, Ctrl+Enter submit, click-inside/outside, deep link routing.

Help overlay fixes:
- Help overlay now passes through q (quit), Ctrl+C (confirm quit),
  and Ctrl+D (detach) instead of swallowing them silently.
- Test: q_key_quits_even_when_help_overlay_visible,
  ctrl_c_requires_confirmation_with_help_overlay_visible.

Command palette theming:
- PaletteStyle derived from active TuiThemePalette, auto-refreshed
  on every theme switch (cycle, named config, init).

Toast overlay improvements:
- Toast area inset by TOAST_OVERLAY_CONTENT_TOP_INSET_ROWS to keep
  KPI header bands free from transient toast borders.
- toast_overlay_area() helper with empty-content fallback.
- ServerStarted toast intentionally suppressed (noisy on restart).

Other improvements:
- Dashboard/chrome/inspector: BorderType::Ascii/Double/Square replaced
  with BorderType::Rounded for visual consistency.
- tui_bridge push_event: non-blocking retry loop (3 attempts with
  yield_now) for important events instead of unconditional blocking push.
- system_health: diagnostics worker thread spawn error is logged instead
  of silently discarding the Option.
- search screen: removed unused highlight_terms field from SearchResultRow,
  gated markdown_to_searchable_lines behind #[cfg(test)].
- threads: context_help_tip updated to mention quick-reply.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2607,7 +2607,7 @@ fn render_dashboard_frame(
         Paragraph::new("MCP Agent Mail Dashboard")
             .block(
                 Block::bordered()
-                    .border_type(BorderType::Ascii)
+                    .border_type(BorderType::Rounded)
                     .title("Dashboard"),
             )
             .render(area, frame);
@@ -2643,7 +2643,7 @@ fn render_dashboard_frame(
     Paragraph::new(header_text)
         .block(
             Block::bordered()
-                .border_type(BorderType::Double)
+                .border_type(BorderType::Rounded)
                 .title(" Live Console "),
         )
         .style(header_style)
@@ -2870,7 +2870,7 @@ fn render_dashboard_frame(
     Paragraph::new(footer_text)
         .block(
             Block::bordered()
-                .border_type(BorderType::Ascii)
+                .border_type(BorderType::Rounded)
                 .title(" Last Request "),
         )
         .style(title_style)
